# Jonathon Plumb — AI Solutions Engineer

> Portfolio of Jon Plumb: production generative-AI and agentic systems.
> Building with LLMs since the GPT-3 era. Detroit, MI.

## Projects
- Nitruz (https://nitruz.com): AI vehicle photography SaaS — live, pre-launch
- ResumeAye (https://resume-aye.onrender.com/): AI resume-tailoring SaaS — live
- The Lab: hardened multi-machine AI lab running Hermes, a self-hosted multi-agent platform (MCP, Claude, Ollama fallback)

## Ask My Portfolio
This site hosts Hermes Concierge, an AI assistant (bottom-right chat widget)
grounded in a verified knowledge base about Jon. Recruiters can ask it
anything — work authorization, availability, project depth — or paste a full
job description and it maps Jon's experience against the requirements point
by point. It is itself one of Jon's builds: serverless, guardrailed,
provider-fallback-routed, structurally cost-capped.
